shipmentIds.description: List of shipment IDs to update

fieldToUpdate.description: Field name to update: ETD, ETA, Vessel, StatusFlow

updatedIds.description: List of successfully updated shipment IDs

errors.description: List of errors encountered during update

success.description: Indicates if the operation was successful

isShippingContainer.description: To know if the package can be container or not

OAuth2.description: Azure AD B2C OAuth2.0 Authorization Code Flow with PKCE

Bearer.description: Legacy JWT Bearer Token. Enter 'Bearer' [space] and then your token. Example: "Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIU..."
Bearer.name: Authorization

ApiKey.description: API Key for external integrations. Enter your API key. Example: "lnbs_sk_abc123..."
ApiKey.name: X-API-Key
